creator: cristianorolim@hotmail.com
text:
This is the update for x11-toolkits/soqt:

diff -ruN Makefile.orig Makefile
--- Makefile.orig	2009-01-22 21:51:39.000000000 -0200
+++ Makefile	2009-01-22 22:00:09.000000000 -0200
@@ -18,6 +18,8 @@
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	Coin.60:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/Coin
 
+CONFLICTS=      SoQt4-[1-2].*
+
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:15
 USE_QT_VER=	3
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
